message:
style(core,repair): apply rustfmt import ordering and expression formatting

Reformats import blocks in ffs-core and ffs-repair to alphabetical
ordering (rustfmt canonical style), expands single-line if/else
expressions into multi-line blocks for readability, and reformats
multi-line string interpolations for consistent indentation.

- Reorder use-statements in ffs-core/src/lib.rs to alphabetical within
  each import group (ffs_alloc, ffs_block, ffs_btrfs, ffs_journal,
  ffs_ondisk, ffs_types)
- Expand single-line ternary-style if/else in ext4_canonical_inode,
  ext4_presented_inode, and erfc_approx into multi-line blocks
- Fix method signature indentation for FsOps::read return type
- Reformat assert! macro calls for removexattr tests to idiomatic style
- Reorder codec.rs imports and collapse multi-line format! string

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
